fact_nuggets.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag in the overworld, it increases encounter rates of rarer wild Pokemon , including Shiny Pokemon , for 200 steps . It also causes all wild Pokemon spawned to have a level 1 greater than the highest level normally in the area (for example, if an area's wild Pokemon normally range from level 3 to level 5, all wild Pokemon will be level 6 instead).
